interface.longDescription:
AutoScout24 - Europe’s Largest Automotive Marketplace!

AutoScout24 gives you access to more than 2 million new and used vehicles from private sellers and trusted dealerships. Whether you’re searching for a compact city car, a premium sedan, an electric vehicle, or a spacious SUV, you’ll find plenty of options — and easily browse listings from both private sellers and professional dealers. Find your next car on AutoScout24.
defaultPrompt: I'm looking for family car for less than 30k€ near Berlin
